abstract.t: This document describes the mechanism and operational guidelines for fast protecting the egress node and link of a Segment Routing for IPv6 (SRv6) path. TI-LFA specifies fast protections for transit nodes and links of an SR path, but does not present protections for the egress node. The solution uses a Mirror SID (End.M) behavior to steer traffic to a protector egress upon failure of the primary egress. The IGP extensions (IS-IS/OSPFv3) can be used to advertise Mirror SID and protected locators.
